# balena_organization (Resource)

Manages a Balena organization.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "balena_organization" "my_org" {
  name   = "My Organization"
  handle = "my_organization"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->

## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Display name of the organization.

### Optional

- `handle` (String) URL-safe handle of the organization. Only alphanumeric characters, underscores, and hyphens are allowed. Auto-generated from name if not set.

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) Numeric identifier of the organization.
